creator: gogo@cs.uni-sb.de
text:
postgresql82-server fails to compile in my tinderbox environment:
http://w5.cs.uni-sb.de/~gogo/log/postgresql-server-8.2.3.log

How-To-Repeat: Set the following environment variables and compile postgresql82-server:
http://w5.cs.uni-sb.de/~gogo/log/postgresql-server-8.2.3.log.env
